description:
Read precise Unity asset detail after locating the target with unity_yaml_list or unity_yaml_search.

For .unity/.prefab files, provide `object_path`. Component and prefab override reads use live Unity Editor state through the locus_unity plugin first so unsaved scene or prefab changes are visible, then fall back to direct text YAML parsing when the Editor path is unavailable. Live Editor reads return Inspector-style GameObject and component fields plus PrefabUtility property modifications for prefab instance roots. Live Editor component reads expand Generic serialized fields such as arrays, structs, Serializable classes, and UnityEvents with bounded depth and item limits. Direct YAML fallback returns serialized YAML fields with references resolved to human-readable asset paths or in-file object names; PrefabInstance fallback includes structured source target overrides, resolved object reference overrides, stripped ref mappings, and removed components.

Use `detail=document` when you need direct serialized YAML document fields. For non-hierarchical YAML assets such as materials, animation clips, animator controllers, and ScriptableObjects, omit `object_path` to read all YAML documents. The tool resolves GUIDs through the asset database when available and scans project metadata when needed.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large YAML detail output is compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

file_path.description: Path to the Unity YAML file, relative to the project root (e.g. 'Assets/Scenes/Main.unity') or absolute path.

object_path.description: Optional hierarchy path to a specific GameObject or PrefabInstance, such as 'Player', 'Environment/Buildings/House01', or a returned duplicate-safe path like 'Root/Enemy[2]'. Use unwrapped paths from unity_yaml_list or unity_yaml_search. If unity_yaml_list displays a name as `⟦Name⟧`, omit the `⟦` and `⟧` markers in object_path.

detail.description: Optional detail mode. 'components' reads a GameObject and its attached component YAML fields with references resolved. 'prefab_overrides' reads structured PrefabInstance override detail. 'document' reads only the targeted YAML document fields with references resolved and internal ids omitted. Defaults to the natural detail for the target.

max_field_depth.description: Optional live Editor component-field expansion depth for Generic serialized fields such as arrays, structs, Serializable classes, and UnityEvents. Defaults to 2 and is clamped to 6.

max_array_items.description: Optional live Editor array/list item limit when expanding Generic serialized fields. Defaults to 20 and is clamped to 200.
